title: Developer account api complexity rate limited to 1,000,000?
excerpt:
Hey there, 
I just noticed that the developer account has a complexity limit of 1,000,000 instead of 10,000,000 for a regular account. This really limits me development and testing wise. Any chance to increase that limit…

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

I just noticed that the developer account has a complexity limit of 1,000,000 instead of 10,000,000 for a regular account. This really limits me development and testing wise. Any chance to increase that limit to at least a regular’s account limit?

Thanks,
Ronen

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff

Could you please write to us at support@monday.com so we can take a further look and apply the limit upgrade there? Thanks so much for your understanding and I’m sorry for the inconvenience related to posting the same request twice in different channels.

-Alex
